message:
perf(record): migrate TaskRecord::increment_mask from std RwLock to parking_lot

Update the remaining if-let-Ok write lock pattern in increment_mask()
to use parking_lot's direct .write() API, removing the poisoning
error path and collapsing the nesting by one level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
